# Group Agreement for Group 7

### How do you expect your fellow group members to participate?
Everyone should contribute an equal amount to group tasks. Speak up when you don't understand something so that no one falls behind (all group members on the same page).

### What is the role of respect, cooperation, mutual trust, and openness in this group?
We will be respectful, cooperative, mutually trusting, and open with each other. 

### If group members disagree on how to approach the in-class assignment, how will that conflict be handled?
Resolve conflicts through communication; use a group vote when discussions run too long. 

### Should you use GenAI at all during group work?
Conditionally (see below). 

### If/when you use GenAI, what expectations do you want to agree on as a group?
We agree that if it is used, it should be used as a problem solving tool and not a code-writing tool. We will try to use each other as resources before turning to AI, and if we do use it, we will use it for specific instances.
